prompt: Create a cinematic widescreen film still of a glamorous platinum blonde woman with a 1960s bouffant hairstyle leaning against a wall in a dim interior, positioned on the far left third of the frame with large negative space to the right. She is bare-shouldered, wearing chunky gold jewelry including exactly 2 visible accessories: a gold chain necklace and a large gold ring, and she holds exactly 1 lit white cigarette beside her cheek with faint smoke drifting upward. Her face is intentionally obscured by exactly 1 opaque square censor block in muted brown, centered over the face and covering the eyes, nose, and mouth while leaving the hair, hand, shoulder, and jewelry visible. Use moody teal-and-gold color grading, low-key directional window light, soft haze, deep shadows, shallow depth of field, realistic skin and hair texture, vintage noir glamour, 35mm anamorphic cinema look, subtle film grain, natural lens softness, dark architectural background with blurred horizontal and diagonal shapes, no text, no watermark.
